endpoints.name: GET /providers/Microsoft.SerialConsole/operations
endpoints.description: Gets a list of Serial Console API operations.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN.

endpoints.name: Get the disabled status for a subscription
endpoints.description: Gets whether or not Serial Console is disabled for a given subscription
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{DEFAULT}} with a real default.

endpoints.name: Disable Serial Console for a subscription
endpoints.description: Disables the Serial Console service for all VMs and VM scale sets in the provided subscription
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{DEFAULT}} with a real default.

endpoints.name: Enable Serial Console for a subscription
endpoints.description: Enables the Serial Console service for all VMs and VM scale sets in the provided subscription
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{DEFAULT}} with a real default.
